recipe.title: Vegetarian chilli
recipe.description: This vegetarian chilli recipe from Jamie Oliver is packed with flavour. Vegetarian chilli is the perfect winter comfort food. Serve with rice, guacamole & lime!

ingredients.name: 400g tins of beans
ingredients.note: such as kidney, chickpea, pinto, cannellini

steps.descr: Peel and chop the sweet potatoes into bite-sized chunks,...
steps.instructions: Peel and chop the sweet potatoes into bite-sized chunks, then place onto a baking tray.

on_enter.say: Peel and chop the sweet potatoes into bite-sized chunks, then place onto a baking tray.

steps.descr: Sprinkle with a pinch each of cayenne, cumin, cinnamon,...
steps.instructions: Sprinkle with a pinch each of cayenne, cumin, cinnamon, sea salt and black pepper, drizzle with oil then toss to coat. Roast for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until golden and tender.

on_enter.say: Sprinkle with a pinch each of cayenne, cumin, cinnamon, sea salt and black pepper, drizzle with oil then toss to coat. Roast for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until golden and tender.

steps.descr: Peel and roughly chop the onion
steps.instructions: Peel and roughly chop the onion. Halve, deseed and roughly chop the peppers, then peel and finely slice the garlic.

on_enter.say: Peel and roughly chop the onion. Halve, deseed and roughly chop the peppers, then peel and finely slice the garlic.

steps.descr: Pick the coriander leaves, finely chopping the stalks
steps.instructions: Pick the coriander leaves, finely chopping the stalks. Deseed and finely chop the chillies.

on_enter.say: Pick the coriander leaves, finely chopping the stalks. Deseed and finely chop the chillies.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, put 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, put 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over a medium-high heat, then add the onion, peppers and garlic, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, put 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over a medium-high heat, then add the onion, peppers and garlic, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Add the coriander stalks, chillies and spices, and cook...
steps.instructions: Add the coriander stalks, chillies and spices, and cook for a further 5 to 10 minutes, or until softened and starting to caramelise, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Add the coriander stalks, chillies and spices, and cook for a further 5 to 10 minutes, or until softened and starting to caramelise, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Add the beans, juice and all
steps.instructions: Add the beans, juice and all. Tip in the tomatoes, breaking them up with the back of a spoon, then stir well.

on_enter.say: Add the beans, juice and all. Tip in the tomatoes, breaking them up with the back of a spoon, then stir well.

steps.descr: Bring to the boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low...
steps.instructions: Bring to the boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and leave to tick away for 25 to 30 minutes, or until thickened and reduced – keep an eye on it, and add a splash of water to loosen, if needed.

on_enter.say: Bring to the boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and leave to tick away for 25 to 30 minutes, or until thickened and reduced – keep an eye on it, and add a splash of water to loosen, if needed.

steps.descr: Stir the roasted sweet potato through the chilli with...
steps.instructions: Stir the roasted sweet potato through the chilli with most of the coriander leaves, then taste and adjust the seasoning, if needed.

on_enter.say: Stir the roasted sweet potato through the chilli with most of the coriander leaves, then taste and adjust the seasoning, if needed.

steps.descr: Finish with a squeeze of lime or lemon juice or a swig...
steps.instructions: Finish with a squeeze of lime or lemon juice or a swig of vinegar, to taste, then scatter over the remaining coriander. Delicious served with yoghurt or soured cream, guacamole and rice, or tortilla chips.

on_enter.say: Finish with a squeeze of lime or lemon juice or a swig of vinegar, to taste, then scatter over the remaining coriander. Delicious served with yoghurt or soured cream, guacamole and rice, or tortilla chips.
